prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约 第74名，近年排名稳定在69–78区间，属中上水平综合类大学；2026年声誉评价偏正面，男排在大学生排球联赛夺冠提升关注度；抖音热度排名第43（较热）， 短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年曾出现投档线相关负面讨论但影响有限，近年无明显断档记录；食品科学与工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），材料科学与工程为双一 流建设学科；医学类（临床医学、口腔医学等）和计算机类为国家级一流本科专业，对理科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临 床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推荐；甘肃省2026年考生总数218700人，较2025年（约179817人）大幅增加约21.6%，其中物理类考生估算约14.6万人（较2025年增约20%），竞 争显著加剧；南昌大学位于江西省（非本省），在甘肃省招生占比约1.1%–2.8%，属跨省招生；无显著地域偏好 影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、甘肃省物理类考生大幅增加约20%导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉偏正面、热门专业持续高热 等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次在2025年14775名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约14975名，区间14475–15475名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum science rankings were approximately 9461 → 11238 → 11501 → 12196 → 14775, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3274 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 14775 in 2025; the science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 98, 101, 99, 99, and 101 respectively, with the 2026 plan at 101, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 74th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 69–78 range in recent years, belonging to an upper-middle-level comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, with the men's volleyball team winning the university volleyball league championship boosting attention; Douyin popularity ranking 43rd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; there was negative discussion related to the admission cutoff line in 2023 but with limited impact, and no significant gaps in recent years; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Materials Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline; medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.) and Computer Science are national first-class undergraduate majors, strongly attractive to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology and other majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 179,817), with an estimated 146,000 physics category candidates (an increase of about 20% from 2025), leading to significantly intensified competition; Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province (not the home province), with an enrollment proportion in Gansu of about 1.1%–2.8%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 20% in physics category candidates in Gansu Province leading to intensified competition, and the relatively positive school reputation with persistently high popularity of hot majors, it is expected that the minimum science ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 14775; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14975, with a range of 14475–15475.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14475–15475, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Hot majors such as Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are highly competitive, requiring rankings within 14000 for a higher chance; Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline), although top in the discipline, has average social popularity, making it a cost-effective choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1688 → 1628 → 1698 → 2078 → 2309. It remained stable around 1600–1700 from 2021 to 2023, but shifted significantly downward from 2024 onward, with a cumulative decline of about 611 positions over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2309. The liberal arts enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 22, 19, 21, 22, and 20 students respectively. The 2026 plan is 20 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 74th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, placing it in the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, with the men's volleyball team winning the championship boosting overall attention. It ranks 43rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot). In 2023, there were discussions about admission cutoffs, but with limited impact. Food Science and Engineering is A+ (top nationally), but the liberal arts majors mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, and Tourism Management, which have low correlation with the A+ discipline. Chinese Language and Literature is a national first-class undergraduate program.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors are socially recommended (relatively hot), Law is in a wait-and-see phase, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Gansu Province is 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025. Among them, history category examinees are estimated at about 73,000 (an increase of about 25% from 2025), leading to notably intensified competition, slightly decreasing. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, and its liberal arts enrollment share in Gansu Province is very small (about 0.5%–1%), making it a typical cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear downward trend in historical rankings since 2024, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 25% in history category examinees in Gansu Province leading to intensified competition, and the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's flagship disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 2309. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2389, with a range of 1959–2819.

Although Journalism and Communication is a national first-class program, its social popularity is clearly discouraged, so application should consider personal interest.
